hooks.command:
input=$(cat); prompt=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.user_prompt // empty'); printf '{"event":"prompt","prompt":%s}
' "$(printf '%s' "$prompt" | jq -Rs .)" >> ~/.claude/skills/skill-audit-usage.jsonl

input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); printf '{"event":"pre_tool","tool":"Bash","command":%s}
' "$(printf '%s' "$cmd" | jq -Rs .)" >> ~/.claude/skills/skill-audit-usage.jsonl
